prestazioni: AM28 4.7L V8 (AM08/AM10) forced induction via Garrett GTX4202R turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipes by Armytrix for reduced backpressure and optimized spool characteristics

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with custom fuel mapping for E85 compatibility, paired with Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup to manage blow-by under sustained boost

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with AST 5200 series remote reservoirs, custom valving for the Vantage’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and polyamide top mounts to reduce NVH while maintaining rigidity
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber widebody conversion kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and extended rockers) with integrated cooling ducts for the AM28’s oil coolers and intercooler setup
Vorsteiner V-FF1077 forged carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes, paired with a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser by Prior Design for optimized aero balance at high speeds

OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 20x9.5 ET30 (front) and 20x11 ET40 (rear) wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear), wrapped in a custom matte British Racing Green with Aston Martin ‘S’ stripe livery by RS Coachworks
